title: Instrument of War
overview: When U.S. B-24 bomber pilot Clair Cline is shot down and captured in northern Germany, one war ends and another begins -- to keep hope alive. Now behind Nazi barbed wire and oppression, Cline and his fellow POW's must find a way to bond together to not just survive but transcend their captivity. Inspired by true events.

trailers.title: Instrument of war trailer 2017
trailers.channel_name: LIFE IN FILM Podcast - with Elliot James
